title: Find us in Blanes
subtitle: Instal Berrozpe
description: We are at Carrer de l'Antiga, 68, in Blanes. You can open the location in Google Maps or contact us before visiting.
mapConsentText: The map is served from Google Maps and may use third-party services. You can open the location directly or load the map if you accept that functionality.
privacyNotice: To protect your privacy, the map does not load automatically until you accept third-party services. At this stage we use a verified external access instead.
fallbackText: Open the location in Google Maps to plan your route.
